title: Amtech A2300 2.2Kg Mattock Head, Drop Forged Steel Head
features: DURABLE: This 2.2kg (5lb) grubbing mattock head is made from strong, drop forged steel
VERSATILE: It has a double ended head with a horizontal and vertical axe and fits all standard pick axe handles, including Amtech model A2400
MANY USES: This tool is highly versatile and can be used for digging, prying and chopping through roots
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
PORTABLE DESIGN: Compact ideal for working in confined spaces.
description: Product Description Make gardening work easier for yourself with Amtech’s A2300 Mattock Head. You can use the mattock head for digging holes for new plants, prying, and chopping through roots. Use the axe end of this mattock for breaking up the soil, and the adze end for digging trenches. The head of this mattock is made with drop forged steel and has a weight of 2.27kg (5lb). You can fit this mattock head to any standard pick handle, or Amtech’s A2400 Pick Axe Handle. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Mattock head See more
